purpose: Governance review catalog of currently supported provider capabilities for supervised AiGOL worker and cognition use.

providers.notes: OpenAI is connected through OPENAI_EXTERNAL_WORKER_PROVIDER_ADAPTER_V1 for EXTERNAL_WORKER_TASK_PACKAGE_V1 to EXTERNAL_WORKER_RESULT_PACKAGE_V1. Function calling, tool use, streaming, and automatic retries are intentionally disabled in the governed worker adapter.
The repository contains a structural Claude adapter contract, but no certified Claude external worker provider adapter, real API boundary, credential policy, or provider-backed worker certification.

Mistral is compatible with the provider-neutral worker architecture, but the repository does not yet contain a certified Mistral adapter, API integration, credential contract, or external worker certification.

known_limitations: Provider capability is cataloged from repository-certified surfaces only.
Function calling is marked false for governed worker usage because the certified OpenAI external worker adapter disables tool use and function calling.
Claude and Mistral remain provider-neutral architecture candidates until adapter, API, validation, and replay certification artifacts exist.
